languages.text: {n}Жалостливый голос юноши переходит на крик, и Вего-Ан оборачивается к вам.{/n} "Они заставили нас! Гнали нас по телам любимых, по льду, по осколкам старой жизни... Заперли, сломали, морили голодом! Дети Ан-Видо погибли у нее на руках, а мою мать истерзали Кошмары! Мы хотели лишь одного — выжить! Выжить любой ценой! И когда еда закончилась... клянусь именем Его, мы никогда не убивали ради пропитания!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Жалостливый голос юноши переходит на крик, и Вего-Ан оборачивается к вам.{/n} "Они заставили нас! Гнали нас по телам любимых, по льду, по осколкам старой жизни... traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

И когда еда закончилась... клянусь именем Его, мы никогда не убивали ради пропитания!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: {n}The young man's pitiful voice rises to a scream, and Vego-An turns to you.{/n} "They made us! They drove us over the bodies of our loved ones, over the ice, over the shards of our former lives... They locked us up, broke us, starved! An-Vido's children perished in her embrace, and my mother was torn apart by Nightmares! We only wanted to survive! Survived at any cost! And when the food ran out... I swear by His name, we never killed for sustenance!"

languages.text: {n}Die klägliche Stimme des jungen Mannes steigert sich zu einem Schrei, und Vego-An dreht sich zu dir um.{/n} "Sie haben uns gezwungen! Sie trieben uns über die Leichen unserer Liebsten, über das Eis, über die Scherben unseres früheren Lebens... Sie sperrten uns ein, brachen uns, ließen uns verhungern! An-Vidos Kinder starben in ihrer Umarmung, und meine Mutter wurde von Albträumen zerrissen! Wir wollten nur überleben! Überleben um jeden Preis! Und als das Essen ausging... Ich schwöre bei Seinem Namen, wir haben nie für unseren Lebensunterhalt getötet!"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man's pitiful voice rises to a scream, and Vego-An turns to you.{/n} "They made us! They drove us over the bodies of our loved ones, over the ice, over the shards of our former lives... They locked us up, broke us, starved! An-Vido's children perished in her embrace, and my mother was torn apart by Nightmares! We only wanted to survive! Survived at any cost! And when the food ran out... I swear by His name, we never killed for sustenance!"

languages.text: {n}La voix pitoyable du jeune homme s'élève jusqu'à un cri, et Vego-An se tourne vers vous.{/n} "Ils nous ont forcés ! Ils nous ont conduits sur les corps de nos proches, sur la glace, sur les tessons de nos anciennes vies... Ils nous ont enfermés, brisés, affamés ! Les enfants d'An-Vido ont péri dans son étreinte, et ma mère a été déchirée par les Cauchemars ! Nous ne voulions que survivre ! Survivre à tout prix ! Et quand la nourriture a manqué... Je jure par son nom que nous n'avons jamais tué pour nous nourrir !"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man's pitiful voice rises to a scream, and Vego-An turns to you.{/n} "They made us! They drove us over the bodies of our loved ones, over the ice, over the shards of our former lives... They locked us up, broke us, starved! An-Vido's children perished in her embrace, and my mother was torn apart by Nightmares! We only wanted to survive! Survived at any cost! And when the food ran out... I swear by His name, we never killed for sustenance!"

languages.text: {n}年轻人可怜巴巴的声音变成了尖叫，维果安转过身来对你说。{/n}"他们创造了我们！他们把我们赶过亲人的尸体，赶过冰面，赶过我们前世的碎片......他们把我们关起来，打碎我们，饿死我们安 -维多的孩子在她的怀抱中死去 我母亲被噩梦撕成碎片我们只想活下去不惜一切代价当食物耗尽时...我以神的名义起誓 我们从不为食物而杀人！"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man's pitiful voice rises to a scream, and Vego-An turns to you.{/n} "They made us! They drove us over the bodies of our loved ones, over the ice, over the shards of our former lives... They locked us up, broke us, starved! An-Vido's children perished in her embrace, and my mother was torn apart by Nightmares! We only wanted to survive! Survived at any cost! And when the food ran out... I swear by His name, we never killed for sustenance!"

languages.text: {n}La voz lastimera del joven se eleva hasta convertirse en un grito, y Vego-An se vuelve hacia ti.{/n} "¡Nos obligaron! Nos condujeron sobre los cuerpos de nuestros seres queridos, sobre el hielo, sobre los fragmentos de nuestras vidas anteriores... Nos encerraron, nos rompieron, ¡nos mataron de hambre! ¡Los hijos de An-Vido perecieron en su abrazo, y mi madre fue destrozada por las Pesadillas! ¡Sólo queríamos sobrevivir! ¡Sobrevivir a cualquier precio! Y cuando se acabó la comida... ¡Juro por Su nombre que nunca matamos por sustento!"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man's pitiful voice rises to a scream, and Vego-An turns to you.{/n} "They made us! They drove us over the bodies of our loved ones, over the ice, over the shards of our former lives... They locked us up, broke us, starved! An-Vido's children perished in her embrace, and my mother was torn apart by Nightmares! We only wanted to survive! Survived at any cost! And when the food ran out... I swear by His name, we never killed for sustenance!"

languages.text: {n}若者の悲痛な声が悲鳴のように上がり、ベゴ＝アンはあなたに向き直った。{/n}「彼らは私たちを作った！彼らは私たちを、愛する者たちの死体の上、氷の上、かつての人生の破片の上に追いやった。私たちを閉じ込め、壊し、飢えさせた！アンヴィドの子供たちは彼女の抱擁の中で死に、私の母はナイトメアに引き裂かれた！私たちはただ生き残りたかった！どんな犠牲を払ってもそして食料が尽きたとき...主の御名に誓って、私たちは決して殺しはしなかった！"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man's pitiful voice rises to a scream, and Vego-An turns to you.{/n} "They made us! They drove us over the bodies of our loved ones, over the ice, over the shards of our former lives... They locked us up, broke us, starved! An-Vido's children perished in her embrace, and my mother was torn apart by Nightmares! We only wanted to survive! Survived at any cost! And when the food ran out... I swear by His name, we never killed for sustenance!"

languages.text: {n}Genç adamın acınası sesi bir çığlığa dönüşüyor ve Vego-An size dönüyor.{/n} "Bizi onlar yaptı! Bizi sevdiklerimizin cesetlerinin üzerinden, buzun üzerinden, eski hayatlarımızın parçalarının üzerinden geçirdiler... Bizi kilitlediler, kırdılar, aç bıraktılar! An-Vido'nun çocukları onun kucağında can verdi ve annem Kabuslar tarafından parçalandı! Tek istediğimiz hayatta kalmaktı! Ne pahasına olursa olsun hayatta kalmak! Ve yiyecek bittiğinde. O'nun adına yemin ederim ki, yemek için asla öldürmedik!"
languages.original_text: {n}The young man's pitiful voice rises to a scream, and Vego-An turns to you.{/n} "They made us! They drove us over the bodies of our loved ones, over the ice, over the shards of our former lives... They locked us up, broke us, starved! An-Vido's children perished in her embrace, and my mother was torn apart by Nightmares! We only wanted to survive! Survived at any cost! And when the food ran out... I swear by His name, we never killed for sustenance!"
